classData.comment:
/**
         * The exact width in pixels of the center columns (the scrollable content).
         * @member {Number} centerWidth_=0
         */
classData.description: The exact width in pixels of the center columns (the scrollable content).
classData.name: centerWidth_

classData.comment:
/**
         * The width in pixels of the locked-end (right) column region.
         *
         * Applied as `margin-right`, so the scrollbar's scrollport covers ONLY the center region.
         * The spacer ({@link #centerWidth}) models the center content, while
         * `Neo.main.addon.GridHorizontalScrollSync` copies this element's `scrollLeft` verbatim onto
         * the center header toolbar — that 1:1 mapping is only exact when scrollport equals the
         * center clip width. Without the margins, the max `scrollLeft` falls short by exactly the
         * locked-region widths, leaving the last center columns unreachable.
         * @member {Number} endWidth_=0
         */
classData.description:
The width in pixels of the locked-end (right) column region.

Applied as margin-right, so the scrollbar's scrollport covers ONLY the center region. The spacer ({@link #centerWidth}) models the center content, while Neo.main.addon.GridHorizontalScrollSync copies this element's scrollLeft verbatim onto the center header toolbar — that 1:1 mapping is only exact when scrollport equals the center clip width. Without the margins, the max scrollLeft falls short by exactly the locked-region widths, leaving the last center columns unreachable.
classData.name: endWidth_

classData.comment:
/**
         * The width in pixels of the locked-start (left) column region.
         * Applied as `margin-left`; see {@link #endWidth} for the scrollport-scoping rationale.
         * @member {Number} startWidth_=0
         */
classData.description: The width in pixels of the locked-start (left) column region. Applied as margin-left; see {@link #endWidth} for the scrollport-scoping rationale.
classData.name: startWidth_

classData.comment:
/**

     * @param {Number} value
     * @param {Number} oldValue
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Triggered after the centerWidth config got changed
classData.name: afterSetCenterWidth

classData.description: Triggered after the endWidth config got changed

classData.comment:
/**

     * @param {Number} oldValue
